from_stage: TRACKER-0 INLINE PROJECT TRACKER RESEARCH AND DESIGN LOCK
required_preconditions: Load TRACKER_0 receipt and design artifacts.
Do not change renderer/enforcement scope without a new design-lock receipt.
Implement only schema and seed state in TRACKER-1.
Stop after writing receipt and handoff.
next_command: Continue MetaBlooms from /mnt/data/Metablooms_OS. Load TRACKER-0 design-lock artifacts and handoff. Run exactly one bounded TRACKER-1 schema and state seed implementation stage: create TRACKER_STATE_SCHEMA_v1.json and initial TRACKER_STATE_v1.json, validate JSON/schema shape, write receipt and handoff, update bundle, and stop before renderer/gate implementation.
